case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. XIAO CHUN ZHANG

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100026034) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT ZHANG, XIAO CHUN

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-28-2017 CONTINUED TO APR-25-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE FEB-28-2017 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-25-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, XIAO CHUN SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-20-2016
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-28-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFFS COUNSEL IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION OF CREDITS TO DEFENDANTS ACCOUNT, WAIVER OF ATTORNEYS FEES AND REQUEST FOR JUDGMENT ON STIPULATION (TRANSACTION ID # 100026034) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
DECLARATION OF NON MILITARY SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100026034) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
DECLARATION RE: VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 100011066) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100012112), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK SERVED JAN-09-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, XIAO CHUN

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZHANG, XIAO CHUN $6,835.95 PRINCIPAL, $330.40 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,166.35, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
